problem_solved: Adds HDMI, USB data ports, and pass-through charging to a USB-C laptop.
stock_observation: Amazon: in stock; Noon: only 5 left at capture.
seller_fulfillment: Amazon.eg seller/shipper; Noon sold by Dokkan Tech with noon-express.
compatibility: USB-C host with DisplayPort Alt Mode; HDMI up to 4K@30Hz; USB-C PD input up to 100W with up to 85W laptop output.
closest_alternative: Baseus UltraJoy BS-OH150 — rejected from launch for single-retailer dependence.
notes: Evidence PP-E001, PP-E002, PP-E027, PP-E028. Charger is not included; verify host video output and use a compliant PD charger/cable.

problem_solved: Adds HDMI, USB data ports, and USB-C power delivery to a USB-C laptop.
stock_observation: Add-to-cart; 50+ recent sales shown; numeric stock not shown.
seller_fulfillment: Sold by wusool; noon-express; one-year warranty.
compatibility: USB-C host; HDMI up to 4K@30Hz; 100W PD input; one USB 3.0 and two USB 2.0 ports.
rejection_reason: No verified Amazon Egypt exact-model product page; Noon title is also ambiguous about port mix.
notes: Evidence PP-E003 and PP-E004. Manufacturer configuration controls over retailer copy.

problem_solved: Adds HDMI, three USB-A data ports, and USB-C power delivery to a USB-C laptop.

compatibility: USB-C host; HDMI up to 4K@30Hz; three USB 3.0 ports; USB-C PD up to 100W.

problem_solved: Raises an open laptop screen and allows angle adjustment for a desk setup.

seller_fulfillment: Amazon.eg seller/shipper; Noon sold by wusool with noon-express.
compatibility: Manufacturer lists 8–17.3-inch laptops, five height levels, hollow ventilation, and up to 5 kg load.
closest_alternative: UGREEN LP230 / 80348 — rejected for non-primary specification source and missing seller evidence.

problem_solved: Raises and angles an open laptop while preserving airflow under the chassis.
compatibility: Regional distributor page lists laptops up to 17 inches and an open airflow design.
rejection_reason: No primary manufacturer source, no verified Amazon page, and missing Noon seller identity.

problem_solved: Stores a closed laptop vertically to reclaim desk space in an external-display workstation.
seller_fulfillment: Noon Marketplace; seller was not retained.
compatibility: Manufacturer lists a 0.5–1-inch slot; retailer diagonal wording conflicts, so device thickness must be checked.
rejection_reason: Unresolved fit conflict, single-retailer dependence, and missing seller evidence.
notes: Evidence PP-E011 and PP-E012. Closed-lid setups only.

problem_solved: Adds powered airflow below a laptop and raises it slightly from the desk.
compatibility: Two 140 mm fans; 5V input; 390 × 280 × 27.5 mm; retailer positions it for 15.6-inch laptops.
rejection_reason: No verified Amazon exact-model page and missing Noon seller identity.
notes: Evidence PP-E013 and PP-E014. Cooling depends on vent layout and is not a repair.

problem_solved: Adds high-speed powered airflow and adjustable height below a 15–17-inch laptop.
seller_fulfillment: Sold by PlanetGate; noon-express; no warranty shown.
compatibility: Manufacturer lists 15–17-inch compatibility, 1800–2400 RPM, 52–58 dB, 5V input, and four heights.
rejection_reason: High stated noise, no captured warranty, and no verified Amazon exact-model page.

problem_solved: Keeps frequently used charging and peripheral cables anchored at the desk edge.
stock_observation: Amazon: only 1 left; Noon: only 2 left.
seller_fulfillment: Amazon sold by Basics EG; shipping party unclear. Noon sold by attention store with noon-express.
compatibility: Manufacturer includes a six-piece variant for cables under 7.5 mm diameter.
closest_alternative: UGREEN-branded CB-54259 clips — rejected for manufacturer identity failure.
notes: Evidence PP-E017, PP-E018, PP-E030. Noon price was unusually high versus Amazon; recheck before publication.

product_name: Logitech Signature M650 Wireless Mouse (small/medium, graphite)

compatibility: Bluetooth Low Energy and Logi Bolt; 200–4000 DPI; right-handed small-to-medium sizing.
closest_alternative: Logitech Lift 910-006473 — rejected for variant co-mingling.
notes: Evidence PP-E019, PP-E020, PP-E031. Amazon title matches M650 graphite small/medium but does not expose the regional part number; compare by named variant.

compatibility: No stable manufacturer or model identifier.

product_name: Havit F2069 Gaming Laptop Cooling Pad
problem_solved: Adds USB-powered airflow and two height positions below 15.6–17.3-inch laptops.
stock_observation: Amazon: in stock; Noon: add-to-cart at capture.
seller_fulfillment: Amazon.eg seller/shipper. Noon offer displayed noon-express; seller must be rechecked before promotion.
compatibility: Official brand page lists four fans, 15.6–17.3-inch fit, dual USB, speed control, and two height settings; Type-C hosts need an adapter.
closest_alternative: DeepCool U PAL — rejected for single-retailer dependence and missing seller evidence.
notes: Evidence PP-E032–PP-E035. The brand store marks the model no longer available there, while both Egypt retailers had current exact pages; treat as a refresh risk. USB-powered accessory, not a laptop repair.
